PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT(YEAR(?electionDate) AS ?electionYear) WHERE {
  ?district wdt:P131 wd:Q1015022 .
  ?member wdt:P1419 ?district .
  ?member wdt:P571 ?electionDate .
  ?member wdt:P106 ?occupation .
  ?occupation rdfs:label ?occLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?occLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(UCASE(STR(?occLabel)) , "SLOT") || CONTAINS(UCASE(STR(?occLabel)) , "RACING"))
}
